svcs: Service Calls (Residential): $115 call-out fee (covers first 30 minutes), then $98/hour (billed in 30-minute increments)
emrg_triggers: Calls from GNM Pressure Washing or properties they manage (Chevron and SOs gas stations) for emergencies after hours.

non_emrg_routing.notes: Initially, calls will be conditionally forwarded to Clara if Ben does not answer or declines on his main number. Once Ben's second number is active, Clara will be the first point of contact and will transfer calls to that second number if a direct conversation with Ben is requested.

aft_hrs_flow: For GNM Pressure Washing and properties they manage, emergency calls are patched through to Ben. For all other callers after hours, Clara will state that she will get back to them on the next business day.
biz_hrs_flow: Clara will answer calls, provide information, and transfer to Ben's second number if a caller wishes to speak directly to him. Clara should mention the service call fee details ($115 call-out fee covering the first 30 minutes, and $98/hour for residential work in 30-minute increments) only if explicitly asked by the caller.
open_qs: What is the official company name for Ben's business?
What is Ben's main business phone number (the number from which calls will be forwarded to Clara and where SMS notifications will be sent)?
What is the new second phone number that Clara should use for call transfers (both during business hours and for emergencies)?
What is the company's physical address?
In which IANA timezone is the business located?
Are Saturdays active business days? If so, what are their open and close times?
Are Sundays active business days? If so, what are their open and close times?
Is there a secondary contact name for emergency routing?
What is the secondary phone number for emergency routing?
What is the desired order for emergency routing if multiple contacts are available?
What is the timeout in seconds before a transfer attempt is considered failed?
How many times should Clara attempt to transfer a call if the first attempt fails?
What message should Clara play if a transfer fails after all retries?
What other systems or tools (e.g., CRM, scheduling software) should Clara integrate with?
notes: Email for post-call notifications: info@bendselectricsolutionsteam.com. The agent has been pre-trained using information from the company's website. A follow-up meeting is scheduled for Friday at 2:00 PM (local time, ~15-20 min duration) to review test calls and dashboard features.
